summary: Comprehensive testing of CoolDown Cart impulse spending app. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: Fixed critical navigation bug (useFocusEffect), all core flows working. AI integration (Gemini 3 Flash) working correctly.

fixed_issues.issue: useFocusEffect from @react-navigation/native causing 'Couldn't find a navigation object' error
fixed_issues.fix: Replaced useFocusEffect with standard useEffect for data fetching on mount

frontend_test_results.login_screen: ✓ Loads correctly with Google sign-in button
frontend_test_results.dashboard: ✓ Loads after authentication, shows empty state or purchase cards
frontend_test_results.tab_navigation: ✓ All tabs working (Queue, Add, History, Settings)
frontend_test_results.add_purchase: ✓ Form works, AI generates waiting period (Gemini 3 Flash)
frontend_test_results.history: ✓ Stats cards display correctly (Saved, Spent, Resisted)
frontend_test_results.settings: ✓ Dark mode toggle works, user profile displays, logout button present
frontend_test_results.ai_integration: ✓ Gemini 3 Flash generates waiting periods and chat responses

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ MongoDB _id properly excluded in all responses
✓ testID attributes on all interactive elements
✓ React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✓ All text wrapped in Text component
✓ Proper error handling in API calls
✓ Auth helper function for protected routes
seed_data_creation: Created test user (test_user_1) and session (test_session_token_123) in MongoDB test_database for testing authenticated endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend navigation bug fixed. AI integration (Gemini 3 Flash) working for both waiting period generation and chat responses. Auth flow working with Emergent Google OAuth. Dark/light mode toggle working. All test data prefixed with TEST_ has been cleaned up.

ai_integration_status.waiting_period_generation: ✓ Generates appropriate waiting periods based on cost

tested_features: ✓ GET /api/auth/me - returns 401 without auth, 200 with valid token
✓ POST /api/purchases - creates purchase with AI-generated waiting period
✓ POST /api/chat/{purchase_id} - sends message and gets AI response
✓ Login screen with Google sign-in button
✓ Dashboard with purchase cards and countdown timers
✓ Add Purchase form with AI analysis
✓ Settings page with Dark Mode toggle and Sign Out
✓ Tab navigation between Queue, Add, History, Settings
